title: RAG Product Review
scenario: Write a product review for the Rugged Adventure Gear (RAG) waterproof backpack. The review should include a brief summary of the product's features and benefits, a rating of the product, and a conclusion summarizing the reviewer's overall opinion. The output should be in a markdown format and include at least 100 words.
constraints: Must include a rating of the product

evaluationCriteria.description: The review is well-written and engaging.
The review meets the word count and rating requirements.
The review sounds realistic and genuine.
